{"step_by_step_thinking": "Prader-Willi syndrome (PWS) and Angelman syndrome (AS) are both associated with uniparental disomy. PWS is typically caused by paternal uniparental disomy, while AS can be caused by maternal uniparental disomy. Russell-Silver syndrome (RSS) is also associated with uniparental disomy, but the specific type is not mentioned in the given documents. Bloom syndrome (BS) is a genetic disorder characterized by immunodeficiency, skin sensitivity, and an increased risk of cancer, and it is not associated with uniparental disomy. Therefore, the syndrome not associated with uniparental disomy is Bloom syndrome.", "answer_choice": "C"}
